category_sources: Official Stellar CLI manual documents XDR encode, decode, compare, generate, and xfile commands.
source_facts.description says this is a command-line tool for encoding and decoding Stellar XDR.
display_name_sources: Official Stellar docs refer to XDR as Stellar's data format, and the package name maps to Stellar XDR tooling.
docs_sources: Official Stellar CLI manual documents the xdr command group used by this tool.
Official Stellar Docs explain XDR as the network data format.
Official Stellar rs-stellar-xdr repository README is the source-level documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official stellar/rs-stellar-xdr repository is the Rust library repository for Stellar XDR; the Brew source archive is the stellar-xdr Rust crate.
tags_sources: Official Stellar XDR docs describe XDR as the standardized encoding for Stellar network data.
source_facts.description identifies Stellar XDR encode/decode CLI behavior.
